case_title: JORLI FLORES VILLANUEVA VS. JUAN ANTONIO GODOY

docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF MAY-31-2017 - CONTINUED FOR INTERPRETER FOR BOTH PARTIES TO JUN-28-2017 AT 8:30 AM IN DEPT. 506. PLAINTIFF JORLI FLORES VILLANUEVE IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT JUAN ANTONIO GODOY IS PRESENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL; CLERK: J. MURPHY; NOT REPORTED. (506)
DECLARATION RE: CORRECTION OF DEFENDANT ADDRESS FILED BY DEFENDANT GODOY, JUAN ANTONIO

REQUEST TO WAIVE COURT FEES AND COSTS PURSUANT TO G.C. 68633, CRC 3.51, 8.26, AND 8.818 (CONFIDENTIAL) FILED BY PLAINTIFF VILLANUEVA, JORLI FLORES ORDER FOR WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS GRANTED PURSUANT TO G.C. 68634 (E), CRC 3.52

THE COURT ORDERS DISMISSAL OF THE ENTIRE ACTION WITHOUT PREJUDICE. PLAINTIFF JORLI FLORES VILLANUEVA DID NOT APPEAR. DEFENDANT JUAN ANTONIO GODOY APPEARED. EXHIBITS NOT RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL, CLERK: A. MOK. NOT REPORTED. (506)
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $3,196.00 FILED BY VILLANUEVA, JORLI FLORES AS TO DEFENDANT GODOY, JUAN ANTONIO ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAY-31-2017 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506
